admin.title: Federation dashboard
admin.noPeers: No remote peers have exchanged traffic yet.
admin.sessionsUnavailable: Prosody admin API is not reachable

hero.tagline: A quiet room. A long table. A correspondence kept honest by the company you choose to keep.

rooms.title: Public & private
rooms.body: Open a room to the floor or keep it invitation-only. Owners set visibility; admins moderate.

direct.title: One-on-one messages
direct.body: Friend-gated personal dialogs with the same reply, edit, and attachment affordances as rooms.

presence.title: Online, AFK, offline
presence.body: Low-latency presence across tabs. Idle more than a minute in all tabs and you go AFK automatically.

attachments.title: Files, images, pastes
attachments.body: Upload up to 20 MB per file. Paste images straight from your clipboard. Comments per attachment.

history.title: Years of it, scrollable
history.body: Persistent message history with infinite scroll - walk back through 100,000 messages without the client stuttering.

moderation.title: Owner, admins, bans
moderation.body: Per-room admins can remove or ban; owners can delete the room. Personal bans freeze DM history, read-only.

cta.title: Pull up a chair.
cta.body: A group chat built for long conversations - persistent history, low-latency presence, and the quiet of a room you control.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Pick up where the conversation last paused.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Claim a name; enter the room.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a link to set a new one.
forgot.success: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Pick a new password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…

empty.body: A parley begins with someone choosing the table. Open a room of your own, or join the floor in progress.

empty.title: Empty desk.
empty.body_line1: Open a new room of your own,
empty.body_line2: or add a contact to talk to.
